overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a fantasy video game showing students in dark wizard robes gathered in a covered timber-framed courtyard. Natural sunlight streams in from the open side facing a grassy hill while characters move around wooden tables examining maps and conversing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered timber courtyard with study tables

events.description: student character enters the courtyard from the grassy hill in the background left

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing students and activity in the courtyard

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes with red and gold scarf leaning over the central map table
student walking into the courtyard from the exterior grassy area

entered.detail: heavy dark wooden beams and trusses supporting the roof with hanging lanterns
large wooden table with parchment or map spread across surface surrounded by students
grey stone tile flooring with geometric patterns
simple wooden seating and tables along the stone wall
sunlit green slope visible through the open side of the structure
dark wooden door with metal fixtures set into the stone wall

segments.scene_description: A static view of a covered timber courtyard in a fantasy school setting. Students in dark robes with house scarves gather around a central map table while natural sunlight illuminates the stone floor. The space opens to a grassy hill on the left where a student enters midway through the clip, and wooden benches line the right wall beneath hanging lanterns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze over a sun-drenched timber courtyard where students in dark wizard robes gather for study. It begins with a wide view of the stone floor and central map table, where the atmosphere is defined by the contrast between the shaded interior and the bright natural light streaming in from the side. As the scene unfolds, the focus shifts toward the open boundary on the left, where a student enters from a lush grassy hill to join the group. The perspective then settles on the surrounding environment, encompassing the wooden benches and hanging lanterns that line the right wall, completing the sense of a lived-in academic sanctuary.
